user.title: Concept2 Logbook
user.description: Generate a personal access token at log.concept2.com → Profile → Edit Profile → Applications → Concept2 Logbook API, then paste it below. The token stays valid until you revoke it on that page.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Concept2 Logbook
reauth_confirm.description: Your Concept2 token is no longer valid (it may have been revoked). Generate a new token at log.concept2.com → Profile → Edit Profile → Applications and paste it below.

full_history_sync.title: Sync workout history
full_history_sync.description: Sync your complete Concept2 workout history now? This gives accurate lifetime totals immediately, but may take longer on first setup if you have a long history. If you say no, lifetime/season totals start from today and grow over time instead.

error.invalid_auth: That access token was rejected by Concept2. Double check you copied the whole token, or generate a new one.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Concept2 Logbook API.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while validating the token.

abort.already_configured: This Concept2 Logbook account is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.wrong_account: Reauthentication was for a different Concept2 account than the one being reconfigured.

init.title: Concept2 Logbook options
init.description: How often to poll the Concept2 API for new results.

error.scan_interval_too_low: Polling interval must be at least {min_minutes} minutes.
